question: Which of the following is NOT a useful vehicle feature from a security perspective? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 4)
canonical_answer:
-Power Locks
-Lock on Gas Cap
-Power Windows
-Air Bags (Correct)
-Internal Hood Release Lever
